steps.title: Introduce the specific prize
steps.content: The phrase the most prestigious award for a person of letters needs to stay intact. The words after the blank, the Nobel Prize in Literature, identify the specific award being described, so the punctuation should introduce that appositive.

steps.title: Place the colon correctly
steps.content: A and B misuse semicolons, which must connect independent clauses. C places the colon too early, splitting for a person of letters away from the noun it modifies. Putting the colon after the full noun phrase correctly introduces the specific prize. The answer is D.
